name: cursor-rules-java
description: A collection of system prompts and skills for Java software engineers covering Maven best practices, dependency management, and Java-specific AI coding workflows for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and IntelliJ.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (297 stars, Apache-2.0, Java, created Feb 2025). Mature project with CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, Maven wrapper (mvnw), and a site-generator. Skills are in .agents/skills/ directory (symlinked from root 'skills'). Contains 2 confirmed skill directories (110-java-maven-best-practices, 111-java-maven-dependencies). Multi-tool support (.cursor, .claude, .agents). Comprehensive documentation (AGENTS.md, SYSTEM-PROMPTS-JAVA.md). A site-generator/ and skills-generator/ indicate tooling around skill creation. No security issues detected.
